channel.title: Market Wire — Finance Headlines
channel.description: Synthetic offline fixture approximating a financial news RSS feed.

item.title: Fed holds rates steady, signals data-dependent path ahead
item.description: The Federal Reserve left its benchmark rate unchanged, citing balanced risks to inflation and employment.

item.title: Apple unveils next-generation silicon at developer conference
item.description: Shares rose in pre-market trading after the company detailed performance gains and new on-device AI features.

item.title: Oil settles higher as supply concerns outweigh demand worries
item.description: Crude futures advanced for a third straight session on tighter inventories.

item.title: Treasury yields edge up ahead of key inflation report
item.description: The 10-year note yield climbed as traders positioned for fresh CPI data.

item.title: Tech megacaps lead a broad equity rally into the weekend
item.description: A risk-on tone lifted the major averages, with semiconductors among the strongest performers.
